StreamID.description: ID of the Stream that owns this Revision.

RevisionName.description: Name assigned to this Revision. It may be descriptive of the changes included in this Revision, e.g. AddedBasementColumns.

Timestamp.description: In UTC.Now ticks. Automatically defined when creating a new Revision.

Author.description: Author of the Stream Revision. Automatically calculated as it should be univocally defined.

Comment.description: Any comment to be added on this this Revision.

Objects.description: Objects to be included in this Revision.

RevisionDiffConfing.description: Diffing settings for this Revision. Hashes of objects contained in this stream will be computed based on these configs. DiffingConfig: General configurations for the Diffing process, including settings for the Hash computation.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
